capabilities.label: Local Inference
capabilities.description: Ability to run language model inference locally via Ollama or bundled GGUF models, without requiring an external API connection.

capabilities.label: Canonical Memory
capabilities.description: Persistent storage and retrieval of conversation memory, habits, and reinforced behavioral patterns across sessions.

capabilities.label: RAG Retrieval
capabilities.description: Retrieval-augmented generation using embedded document chunks from the local knowledge base. Requires embedding model availability.

capabilities.label: External Search
capabilities.description: Web search and retrieval via configured external providers (Brave, SearXNG, or other curated providers). Requires network access and provider configuration.

capabilities.label: Reflection Dashboard
capabilities.description: Real-time display of Tala's reflection pipeline state, active goals, proposal queue, and journal entries. Requires ReflectionService to be running.

capabilities.label: Settings Panel
capabilities.description: Full-featured settings UI for configuring inference providers, memory, tools, guardrails, and all other subsystems.

capabilities.label: MCP Tools
capabilities.description: Model Context Protocol tool invocation system for calling external tools, filesystem access, code execution, and other MCP-compatible services.

capabilities.label: Soul & Identity
capabilities.description: Tala's core identity engine maintaining consistent values, behavioral boundaries, ethical framework evaluation, and narrative continuity across sessions.

capabilities.label: Hybrid Memory Manager
capabilities.description: Coordinated management of short-term, long-term, and episodic memory across multiple storage backends with salience scoring and access-count ranking.

capabilities.label: Self-Maintenance
capabilities.description: Automated detection and recovery from runtime degradation, provider failures, and environment issues. Operates in observation, recommend, or auto-recovery modes.
